steps.title: Look for protection
steps.content: The claim says the speaker feels protected by the mountain. The best quotation must show a feeling of shelter or safety connected to the mountain, not just describe scenery or movement.

steps.title: Reject neutral quotations
steps.content: Choice A describes a ravine and pasture. Choice B only says the mountain stood there, and Choice D describes the speaker going around the mountain. The quotation about feeling behind a wall and sheltered from wind directly illustrates protection. The answer is C.
